sentences.text: The Za128rs extension requires that the reservation sets used by the instructions in the Zalrsc extension be contiguous, naturally aligned, and at most 128 bytes in size.
sentences.section: Preamble > Za128rs Extension for Reservation-Set Size, Version 1.0

sentences.text: The Za64rs extension requires that the reservation sets used by the instructions in the Zalrsc extension be contiguous, naturally aligned, and at most 64 bytes in size.
sentences.section: Preamble > Za128rs Extension for Reservation-Set Size, Version 1.0 > Za64rs Extension for Reservation-Set Size, Version 1.0

sentences.text: The Za64rs extension implies the Za128rs extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > Za128rs Extension for Reservation-Set Size, Version 1.0 > Za64rs Extension for Reservation-Set Size, Version 1.0
